query:
SELECT
                ia.id          AS "id!: Uuid",
                ia.issue_id    AS "issue_id!: Uuid",
                ia.user_id,
                ia.agent_id,
                ia.assigned_at AS "assigned_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
            FROM issue_assignees ia
            INNER JOIN issues i ON i.id = ia.issue_id
            WHERE i.project_id = ANY($1)
            ORDER BY ia.assigned_at ASC
